name: You Can't Take Our King This Early in the Game.

issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete and incorrect. The effect requires: (1) reveal 1 card from top of deck, (2) play up to 1 Character with type 'Whitebeard Pirates' and cost ≤3, (3) place rest at top or bottom of deck. Current DSL lacks filter for type and cost, lacks the reveal mechanic, and lacks placement choice for non-played cards.
Duration should be 'DuringThisBattle' or 'UntilEndOfBattle', not 'EndOfBattle'. The power boost applies specifically during the current battle resolution.
Target specification incomplete. Should clarify 'up to 1' with proper targeting constraints (max 1 target).

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +3000 power during this battle. Then, reveal 1 card from the top of your deck and play up to 1 Character card with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" and a cost of 3 or less. Then, place the rest at the top or bottom of your deck.
